siteDescription: A multilingual professional dictionary of scientific terms, abbreviations, and concepts in the medical field. Accurate translations and scientifically based descriptions in one place.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.desc: Please read the terms of use carefully.

abbreviation.title: Dictionary of Medical Abbreviations
abbreviation.desc: Search for medical abbreviations and their full forms.

stats.title: Dictionary Statistics
stats.subtitle: General statistics for all terms, abbreviations, and languages in the system.

about.title: About the Project
about.description: Medical Science Dictionary is a multilingual professional electronic dictionary of scientific medical terms, abbreviations and concepts. The platform is designed for medical professionals, students and researchers.
about.mission_text: To consolidate medical terminology in Uzbek, Russian and English into one convenient platform, provide fast and accurate search, and eliminate language barriers in the medical field.
about.feature_terms_desc: Thousands of medical terms and their descriptions in Uzbek, Russian and English
about.feature_abbr_desc: Search medical abbreviations and their full forms
about.feature_search_desc: Instant search by letter or keyword
about.feature_multilang_desc: The site interface works in three languages
about.author_desc: Scientific editor of the dictionary and project director
